mapper.select: SELECT rd.product_id AS productId, r.franchise_id AS franchiseId, SUM(rd.quantity) AS totalQuantity FROM `RETURN` r INNER JOIN return_detail rd ON r.id = rd.return_id WHERE r.created_at BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} AND r.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' AND rd.STATUS = 'APPROVED' GROUP BY r.franchise_id, rd.product_id
